english: Forgiving others is forgiving yourself

chinese: 原谅生活所有的不完美
english: Forgive all imperfections in life
Reconcile and live gently with life

chinese: 保持乐观笑对人生起落
english: Stay optimistic and smile at life's ups and downs

chinese: 笑着面对生活所有风雨
english: Face all life's storms with a smile
Smile and move forward through life's storms
Good or bad, it's all experience

chinese: 所有经历都是成长养分
english: All experiences nourish growth
Getting through the low point brings sunshine
Settle and work hard silently in low times
Be low-key and steady in good times

chinese: 得意时不忘形失意时不气馁
english: Not complacent in success, not discouraged in failure
Don't drift in good times, don't lose heart in bad times
Work steadily and live low-key
Take every step of life steadily

chinese: 脚踏实地方能行稳致远
english: Down-to-earth makes a long and steady journey
Stay true to the beginning to reach the end
Stick to your heart to gain peace of mind
Keep original heart and head forward
Keep kindness in heart and face the sun all the way

chinese: 心怀温暖一路温柔前行
english: Keep warmth in heart and move forward gently
Eyes with light, heart with dreams
Have dreams and fear no distance
Take dreams as horse, live up to youth
Live up to time and this life
This life is enough, peace is fine
Live simply and peacefully all life
Ordinary life, warm and peaceful
Ordinary world year after year
Peaceful, smooth, joyful and carefree
All goes well, peaceful every year
Blessings warm four seasons, smooth and healthy
Lucky, auspicious and safe
Joy always accompanies, no worries year after year
Gentle wind always stays, all things better than expected
